design_philosophy.core_loop: Select club, aim trajectory, execute swing, navigate course holes sequentially toward completion
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Precision execution: translating player intention (aim, power, club selection) into accurate ball placement across varying hole layouts
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Simulate authentic golf experience with strategic club selection and precise shot execution
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Early Nintendo sports title that prioritizes mechanical simplicity and accessibility over simulation depth; designed by Satoru Iwata as foundational NES sports software

difficulty.checkpointing: Per-hole progression; players complete holes sequentially within a course
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High agency through club selection (varying clubs with different characteristics) and shot angle/power adjustment; no difficulty settings documented

replayability_hooks: Varied hole layouts requiring different strategic approaches

world_building_techniques: Regional localization (meter vs. yard measurements reflect different golfing traditions)

environmental_storytelling: Hole layouts communicate difficulty progression and course geography
Unused object sprites suggest iterative course design
